## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type

- [ ] Content (term definitions, examples, related terms, translations)
- [ ] Media (3s/5s previews, generated assets, thumbnails)
- [ ] Code (UI, lib, schema, tooling)
- [ ] Governance (docs, CONTRIBUTING, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, licensing)

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue: Fixes #
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Schema validation passes (where applicable)
- [ ] Screenshots or short clip attached (if UI changes)
- [ ] Rights and provenance attested (if media contribution)
